skillIntegrity.workflow: brainstorm → planning → architecture/design → UI/UX → code review → debug → fix/cook → tests → optimization → Fable judge

features.rsvp: native dialog + lazy Google Forms iframe + full-screen fallback
features.map: native dialog + lazy Google Maps iframe + external directions
features.fonts: Google Fonts: Be Vietnam Pro, Lora, Dancing Script
features.sharing: general URL by default; personalized link copied explicitly

confirmedFixes: RSVP helper scripts now use 10h00, 28/07/2026 and the full address.
Horizontal overflow from left/right motion is clipped at the root.
The lazy iframe remains renderable behind its loading overlay, avoiding a hidden+lazy deadlock.

pendingExternalConfiguration.guestNameEntry: empty; Google Forms name prefill is not active
pendingExternalConfiguration.googleFormAccess: must be tested live in an incognito browser
pendingExternalConfiguration.mapPin: must be compared with the exact family pin
